testcase.name: loginAPITest

error.message: class com.dataproviders.api.bean.UserBean cannot be cast to class com.api.request.model.UserCredentials (com.dataproviders.api.bean.UserBean and com.api.request.model.UserCredentials are in unnamed module of loader 'app')
